data.title: Newmark Group will announce Q4 and full year 2025 financial results on Feb 25, 2026, with a conference call at 10:00 a.m. ET.
data.description: A conference call has been set for January 21, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time in New York. Newmark Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: NMRK), a prominent commercial real estate advisor catering to major institutional investors and global corporations, will be hosting the call.

data.title: Fulton Financial Corp reports $96.4 million net income for Q4 2025, $0.53 per share, a $1.5 million drop.
data.description: In Lancaster, Pennsylvania, on January 21, 2026, Fulton Financial Corporation (NASDAQ: FULT) announced its financial results. The corporation disclosed a net income available to common shareholders amounting to $96.4 million, translating to $0.53 per diluted share for the fourth quarter of 2025. This represented a decrease of $1.5 million compared to the previous period.

data.title: Lennar Corp (NYSE: LEN & LEN.B) declares a $0.50 dividend per share for both Class A & B stock, payable on Feb 19, 2026.
data.description: In Miami on January 21, 2026, the Board of Directors of Lennar Corporation (NYSE: LEN and LEN.B), a prominent homebuilding company, disclosed a quarterly cash dividend of $0.50 per share for their Class A and Class B common stock. Shareholders can anticipate this payment on February 19, 2026.

data.title: Geisha J. Williams elected to PSEG Board of Directors, with 35 years in energy industry. Effective from March 1, 2026.
data.description: A recent press release revealed that Geisha J. Williams will join the Board of Directors of Public Service Enterprise Group Incorporated (PSEG) starting from March 1, 2026. With a remarkable 35 years of experience in the energy sector, Williams will bring valuable insights to the company. This announcement was made by PSEG, a leading energy company based in Newark, N.J., on January 21, 2026.

data.title: e.l.f. Beauty to release Q3 fiscal 2026 results on Feb 4, 2026 at 4:30pm EST. Webcast hosted by CEO and CFO.
data.description: e.l.f. Beauty (NYSE: ELF) based in Oakland, California, disclosed plans for a webcast concerning its third quarter Fiscal 2026 outcomes scheduled for Wednesday, February 4, 2026, at 4:30 p.m. ET. The event will feature Tarang Amin, Chairman and CEO, and Mandy Fields, Senior VP and CFO, with a preceding press release detailing the Company’s performance. Those interested can view the live webcast at https://investor.el.

data.title: Installed Building Products closed $500 million notes offering and increased ABL credit facility to $375 million.
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio, Installed Building Products, Inc. (NYSE: IBP), known for installing insulation and related building materials, has completed a private offering of $500 million in 5.625% senior unsecured notes due 2034. The company also adjusted its current $250 million asset-based lending revolving credit facility (ABL Revolver), expanding it for various purposes.

data.title: Paysign, Inc. to present at Oppenheimer 11th Annual Emerging Growth Conference in Henderson, Nevada.
data.description: Paysign, Inc. is scheduled to participate in the Oppenheimer 11th Annual Emerging Growth Conference in Henderson, Nevada. The company will be presenting at the conference, which is a notable event focused on showcasing emerging growth opportunities. This presents a valuable opportunity for Paysign, Inc. to engage with potential investors, industry experts, and stakeholders. Such conferences are crucial for companies looking to expand their reach, raise capital, and enhance visibility in the market. This conference is particularly significant, given its focus on emerging growth, indicating Paysign, Inc.'s potential for further development and success in the future.

data.title: Trane Technologies (NYSE: TT) named to FORTUNE Most Admired Companies list for 14th year, top in industry on nine criteria.
data.description: Trane Technologies, a leading global climate innovator listed on NYSE as TT, has been honored by Fortune as one of the World’s Most Admired Companies for the 14th consecutive year. This prestigious recognition is based on a comprehensive evaluation by Korn Ferry, encompassing nine key criteria such as investment value and product excellence. Fortune's annual list acknowledges top companies in each industry, solidifying Trane Technologies' reputation as a highly regarded entity in the corporate world.

data.title: GeoPark surpasses production guidance in 4Q2025, closes year exceeding targets in Colombia and Argentina operations.
data.description: GeoPark Limited, a prominent energy company operating in Latin America, has released its operational update for the fourth quarter of 2025. The company, listed on NYSE as GPRK, exceeded its annual production target with successful operations in Colombia and Argentina. In 2025, GeoPark had over 20 years of experience in the industry and managed to surpass its production goals. This positive outcome showcases the Company's strong performance during the mentioned period.

data.title: HEI to report Q4 & full year 2025 results on Feb 27. Conference call at 11:30am Hawaii time. Dial 1-888-660-6377 (U.S.) or 1-929-203-0797 (international) with passcode 2393042 for updates.
data.description: Hawaiian Electric Industries, Inc. (HEI) listed on the NYSE under the symbol HE, is scheduled to reveal its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on Friday, February 27. The discussion regarding these results will take place through a webcast and conference call at 11:30 a.m. Hawaii time (4:30 p.m. Eastern time). To participate in the conference call, individuals can dial 1-888-660-6377 (U.S.) or 1-929-203-0797 (international) and input the passcode 2393042. Additionally, interested parties have the option to access presentation materials and/or listen to the conference call.
THERANOS FOUNDER ELIZABETH HOLMES ASKS TRUMP FOR PARDON

data.title: U.S. Hemp Roundtable leads 100+ meetings on Capitol Hill, urging extensions crucial for 2026 planting season.
data.description: Over 100 meetings were organized by the U.S. Hemp Roundtable (USHR) as industry leaders, farmers, and advocates gathered in Washington, D.C. to engage with lawmakers. The focus was on crucial extensions needed for the upcoming 2026 planting season. The meetings aimed to discuss legislative matters that are vital for the industry's growth and development. This initiative highlights the significance of collaboration between stakeholders and policymakers in shaping the future of hemp production in the United States.

data.title: Suburban Propane Partners, L.P. (NYSE:SPH) to hold fiscal 2026 first quarter results conference call at 9:00 AM on Feb 5, 2026.
data.description: Whippany, New Jersey - Suburban Propane Partners, L.P. (NYSE:SPH) revealed today the upcoming Fiscal 2026 First Quarter Results Conference Call set for February 5, 2026, at 9:00 AM EST. This call will be open to analysts, investors, and other interested parties.

data.title: GE Aerospace's stock rises into buy zone ahead of Q4 earnings announcement. The article suggests a positive outlook.
data.description: GE Aerospace announced their Q4 earnings on Thursday. Prior to the announcement, GE stock experienced a significant increase on Wednesday, entering a buy zone. This surge was notable as the stock rebounded to a key buy point. The news was shared by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Trump won't increase tariffs, plans to negotiate for Greenland; S&P 500 rises after Davos speech.
data.description: In his address at Davos, President Donald Trump expressed his intention to engage in prompt discussions for obtaining Greenland, emphasizing that force will not be employed. Following this announcement, there will be no increase in tariffs as part of the Greenland 'framework'. This news resulted in a significant surge of the S&P 500.

data.title: FSK (NYSE: FSK) to release Q4 and full year 2025 results on Feb 25, 2026. Conference call details to follow.
data.description: In Philadelphia and New York, on January 21, 2026, FS KKR Capital Corp. (NYSE: FSK) revealed its intention to disclose the financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 following the market close on the New York Stock Exchange on Wednesday, February 25, 2026. FSK will conduct its fourth-quarter briefing, providing further details on its performance.

data.title: Dow Jones up as Trump cancels Europe tariffs at Davos. Netflix stock down on earnings. Schwab influenced.
data.description: On Wednesday, the Dow Jones index experienced a boost as President Trump delivered remarks at the Davos conference. However, Netflix faced a significant drop in its stock value following its earnings report. The stock market today saw the Dow climbing sharply after Trump's announcement of calling off tariffs on European goods. Charles Schwab also had a notable influence on the market.

data.title: Rayonier to release Q4 2025 earnings on Feb 11, with conference call on Feb 12. Info available at www.rayonier.com.
data.description: The forestry company Rayonier Inc. (NYSE:RYN) intends to announce its Q4 2025 financial results after the market closes on February 11, 2026. Following this, a conference call and live audio webcast are scheduled for 10:00 a.m. (ET) on February 12 to analyze the outcomes. Interested parties can access supplementary materials and the live webcast at www.rayonier.com. A replay of the webcast will be stored on the company’s website for future reference.

data.title: Elucidata unveils AI Lab for Biomedical AGI research. Launch aims to advance Artificial General Intelligence in R&D.
data.description: Elucidata unveiled the opening of an AI Lab in San Francisco, concentrating on Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) in various Biomedical R&D sectors.

data.title: UDR reported 2025 tax treatment of distributions, including per share figures and Form 1099-DIV box numbers.
data.description: UDR, Inc. disclosed the tax status of its 2025 distributions to shareholders. Each share received distributions outlined as follows:- Total Ordinary Dividends per share: Box 1a- Qualified Dividends per share: Box 1b- Total Capital Gain Distributions per share: Box 2a- Unrecaptured Sec. 1250 per share: Box 2bThe company, listed on NYSE as UDR, is a prominent multifamily real estate investment trust. Shareholders' Record Date and Payment Date were specified for the 2025 distributions.
